title: Tick Control in Massapequa, NY | $125 - $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Massapequa, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts. Call today for $125 - $325 treatments.
intro: Massapequa's beautiful residential neighborhoods and proximity to parks make it an ideal habitat for ticks that can threaten your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick control services throughout Massapequa, from Brady Park to the Massapequa Preserve, protecting your outdoor spaces year-round. Our proven treatments eliminate existing tick populations and create barriers to prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings decades of experience serving Long Island communities with EPA-approved treatments tailored to Massapequa's unique environment. Our licensed technicians understand local tick species and seasonal patterns, providing effective protection with flexible scheduling and guaranteed results for $125 - $325.
localContext: Massapequa's tree-lined streets, proximity to the Massapequa Preserve, and family-friendly parks like John J. Burns Park create perfect conditions for deer ticks and other species. Whether you live near the waterfront along South Oyster Bay or in the residential areas around Sunrise Highway, our targeted tick control protects your yard and outdoor living spaces.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Massapequa?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Massapequa typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in spring and fall. However, mild winters on Long Island can mean ticks remain active year-round. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall for optimal results.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Massapequa?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Massapequa range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, level of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season at better value.

faqs.question: Are your tick treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment dries. Our treatments target ticks while minimizing impact on beneficial insects.

faqs.question: Do you service areas near the Massapequa Preserve?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Properties near the Massapequa Preserve and other wooded areas require special attention due to higher tick populations. We create customized treatment plans that focus on barrier protection along wooded edges, tall grass areas, and transition zones where ticks are most likely to encounter humans and pets.
